The GetTokenExchangeToken function in object/token_oauth.go validates JWT signatures but does not verify that the token's user belongs to the same organization as the target application. This can result in privilege escalation across organizational boundaries.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.0042, "percentile": 0.33517}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-c9w5-qp6m-m395", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-07-09T23:32:36Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-c9w5-qp6m-m395", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-c9w5-qp6m-m395"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-9094"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-05-28T17:16:34Z", "published_at": "2026-05-28T18:30:32Z", "references": ["https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-9094", "https://kb.cert.org/vuls/id/780781", "https://github.com/casdoor/casdoor/commit/d92b8568686d", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-c9w5-qp6m-m395"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "critical", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/casdoor/casdoor", "summary": "Casdoor: GetTokenExchangeToken bypass through lack of cross-organization JWT signature check", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-07-09T23:32:37Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-c9w5-qp6m-m395", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2.387.0", "package": {"ecosystem": "go", "name": "github.com/casdoor/casdoor"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 2.387.0"}], "withdrawn_at": null}
